prompt:
Use my uploaded portrait only for my facial identity and hairstyle. Create a realistic fantasy portrait in an elegant dark oriental style: side-profile composition, long flowing black hair, an intricate jeweled gold headdress with blue gemstones, delicate floral face art, luminous butterfly near the face, translucent shimmering robe, floral decorations on the shoulder and chest, and soft glowing blossoms around me. Black background, dreamy blue-pink lighting, ethereal atmosphere, ornate vintage frame border, cinematic fine-art photography. Keep my face recognizable and realistic, with natural skin texture and a real human look, not anime or plastic. No watermark, no logo, no text

Negative Prompt:
watermark, logo, text, anime, cartoon, plastic skin, doll-like face, over-smoothed skin, fake eyes, distorted face, bad anatomy, low quality, blurry details, oversaturated colors, extra accessories, messy composition
